$comment: Tool declarations for the cpp instance. cl_check is the single-file oracle; new_project/build_project/stage_and_build are the project lifecycle (cl); read_file/read_project/register_file/log_edit are language-agnostic project memory; make_launcher writes a SAC-safe .cmd. ingest-* are bare convention tools.

tools.name: cl_check
tools.description: Syntax/semantic-check a complete C++ compilation unit with MSVC cl (/Zs, no codegen) under vcvars32. Source on stdin; OK + exit 0, or diagnostics + exit 1. Override standard with CL_STD (default c++17).

tools.name: new_project
tools.description: Scaffold a C++ project under workspaces/<name> (src/main.cpp + src/core, dist/, project.json, PROJECT.md). Arg: spec = "<name> [console|win32]" - win32 scaffolds a WinMain window app (subsystem windows, links user32/gdi32). Then /ws switch <name>.

tools.name: build_project
tools.description: Compile + link a whole C++ project with cl to a persistent dist/<name>.exe. Arg: proj = name (under workspaces/) or path. OK/diagnostics + exit 0/1.

tools.name: stage_and_build
tools.description: Write a candidate C++ file into a project's src tree and build the WHOLE project with cl; report OK or diagnostics. Code on stdin.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Print one project source file verbatim, to ground a surgical edit on its exact current contents.

tools.name: read_project
tools.description: Show a project's state and grounding: PROJECT.md, project.json, the src tree, manifest drift. Arg: proj.

tools.name: register_file
tools.description: Record a newly added file in a project's on-disk memory (project.json.files + PROJECT.md). Idempotent.

tools.name: log_edit
tools.description: Append an 'edited' line to a project's PROJECT.md changelog.

tools.name: link_libs
tools.description: Declare extra import libraries for a project so build_project links them (e.g. ws2_32.lib for Winsock, d3d12.lib + dxgi.lib for Direct3D). Merges into project.json libs.

tools.name: doctor_cl
tools.description: Domain probe for `ratchet doctor`: exit 0 if MSVC cl is reachable through vcvars32, else 1. Referenced from ratchet.json requirements (tool check).

tools.name: bootstrap_vcpkg
tools.description: One-time setup of vcpkg (the package getter add_package uses): git clone microsoft/vcpkg + bootstrap-vcpkg.bat, then records VCPKG_ROOT. Downloads from the official MS repo. Idempotent. Run via /do.

tools.name: add_package
tools.description: Provision a third-party C++ library with vcpkg and wire it into project.json (includes/libdirs/libs) so build_project can compile+link against it. Header-only ports need no libs. Run via /do. If vcpkg is absent it prints bootstrap steps. Triplet defaults to x86-windows.

tools.name: run_app
tools.description: Run a built project's exe, feeding test input on stdin and capturing stdout/stderr/exit with a timeout. For observing runtime behavior; native exes are SAC-gated so launch may be blocked (reported, not hung). The build remains the deterministic oracle.
